_doc: Frozen list of paths EGG-API contractually commits to on the PUBLIC OpenAPI schema (``GET /v1/openapi.json``).
Admin surfaces live at ``/admin/v1/openapi.json`` (auth-gated) and are NOT part of this snapshot:
the public schema intentionally strips them so anonymous callers cannot fingerprint the operator surface.
Adding or removing an entry here is a DELIBERATE breaking change:
1. Decide whether the change is a major/minor per the SemVer contract.
2. Update this snapshot AND the CHANGELOG under the appropriate
A drift here fails the Sprint 5 contract test with a clear message.
